title: crotalaria sonorensis
intro: Crotalaria sonorensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria sonorensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
